Index — 005 services All by site visit
No. 002 / 003

Five moves.

A short, fixed list. Each service is one session, one room, one practitioner. No upsell, no booking widget, no second tier.

Enquire
The list — by ordinary order

In order.

Consult

A first visit, ninety minutes, in the studio. We look, we ask, we plan. Nothing is sold; nothing is begun. If a second visit follows, it will be booked from this room.

90 min — by referral

Resurface

A focused session on the upper layer. Lactic, mandelic, a single retinoid in turn. Skin is read first, then worked. The session ends when the skin asks it to.

75 min — single visit

Restore

After resurface, or after the season has been hard. A slow protocol of barrier, lipid, and pause. Often paired in advance with a Consult.

60 min — paired visit

Renew

A standing quarterly visit for the studio regulars. Read, refine, record. A short report follows by email.

90 min — quarterly

Tend

A short, between-visits maintenance call. Forty minutes. For the standing list only, by prior arrangement.

40 min — standing list
To begin with a Consult

Quietly.

Enquire
